title: Boys' Night Out
writer: Ira Wallach, Marion Hargrove, Arne Sultan
actors: Kim Novak, James Garner, Tony Randall
plot: Four men bored with their Thursday nights out from their wives (and mom) rent a love nest in New York City, equipped with a blonde. What they don't know is that she's writing a postgraduate thesis on sexual fantasies of urban men.
